name: TEAMGROUP MP44 8TB M.2-2280 PCIe 4.0 x4 with NVMe Internal Solid State Drive - Heat Dissipating Graphene Label - 3D TLC NAND - SLC Caching - Read up to 7,200 MB/s - Write up to 6,000 MB/s - 6000TBW (TM8FPW008T0C101)
shortName: TEAMGROUP MP44 8TB M.2-2280 PCIe 4.0 x4 with NVMe
description: An 8TB internal NVMe SSD with PCIe 4.0 x4 interface, 3D TLC NAND, and graphene cooling for high-capacity storage.
